events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: mechanical digging inside the tolerance zone violates 811/CGA best practices (which require hand or vacuum excavation within that zone), so the finding is a **fail**, rated **critical** risk due to the potential for an undetected utility strike. Actions specify stopping mechanical excavation, hand/vacuum exposing the utility to verify integrity, and notifying the utility owner if damage is found before the work can be accepted.
